The '''Hunter''' was an aquatic destroyer used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] chiefly to approach and destroy enemy vessels and shore emplacements. It was armed with powerful short-range [[Energy pummel/Legends|energy pummels]] which were put on the front center of the vehicle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
